name: Chicken Pakora
recipeIngredient: Approx same size piece of ginger
1 chopped jalapeno pepper (if you want it spicy)
1 tsp lemon juice OR 2 tsp plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients except chicken and chickpea flour until fine.
2. Use this mixture to marinate the chicken pieces for at least one hour.
3. Mix water with the chickpea flour until the batter is thin, similar to honey consistency.
4. Coat each chicken piece in the batter.
5. Fry the pieces under low heat until they reach a medium brown color.
6. Serve as an appetizer or snack. Yields 4-6 servings.
